title: Marvell reportedly to shed 4% of workforce
text: Marvell Technology Inc. MRVL, +1.93% reportedly will shed 4% of its global workforce, the latest Silicon Valley company to announce job cuts, citing a slowdown in the semiconductor industry. Late Tuesday, Bloomberg News reported that Marvell said it was going to trim its workforce of 320.

title: Is Marvell (MRVL) a Buy as Wall Street Analysts Look Optimistic?
text: The average brokerage recommendation (ABR) for Marvell (MRVL) is equivalent to a Buy. The overly optimistic recommendations of Wall Street analysts make the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric questionable.

title: Semiconductor Stocks Climb Yet Inventories Bedevil Chip Industry; A Reality Check May Be Coming
text: Investors are profiting in semiconductor stocks this year, but analysts are wary. Here's what you should know about the chip industry right now.

title: Will Marvell Technology Survive and Thrive After the Chip Downturn?
text: Marvell recently reported earnings, and unfortunately for investors, its guidance did not meet expectations due to the memory market downturn, creating a tailwind for its data center solutions.

title: The Chip Downturn Finally Comes for Marvell Technology: Is the Stock Still a Buy?
text: Marvell Technology Group had a fantastic year, but the year ahead could be quite a bit more turbulent. Cloud customers are starting to reduce orders for some components to deal with an excess of inventory, casting some doubt on Marvell's growth prospects through the next 12 months.

title: Marvell to Showcase Cloud-Optimized Electro-Optics and Networking at OFC 2023
text: SAN DIEGO , March 6, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Marvell Technology, Inc. (NASDAQ: MRVL), a leader in data infrastructure semiconductor solutions, today announced the details of its participation at the 2023 Optical Networking and Communication (OFC) Conference. OFC is the premier event for optical communications and networking professionals.

title: Marvell's downbeat guidance wasn't a big surprise — but these factors were
text: Marvell Technology Inc.'s latest round of downbeat guidance didn't necessarily come as a shock, but the company's cautious commentary on a second-half recovery may have.

title: Marvell (MRVL) Q4 Earnings Match, Revenues Beat Expectations
text: Marvell's (MRVL) fiscal fourth-quarter performance reflects solid demand for its chip in the enterprise networking, carrier infrastructure and automotive end markets.

title: Marvell (MRVL) Reports Q4 Earnings: What Key Metrics Have to Say

title: Marvell Technology (MRVL) Q4 Earnings Match Estimates

(NASDAQ:MRVL ) Q4 2023 Earnings Conference Call March 2, 2023 4:45 PM ET Company Participants Ashish Saran - Senior Vice President, Investor Relations Matt Murphy - President & Chief Executive Officer Willem Meintjes - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Ross Seymore - Deutsche Bank Vivek Arya - Bank of America Toshiya Hari - Goldman Sachs C.J. title: Chipmakers Broadcom, Marvell Diverge With Quarterly Reports
text: Chipmakers Broadcom and Marvell Technology reported quarterly results late Thursday. AVGO stock rose and MRVL stock fell on the news.

title: Marvell stock declines after inventory corrections weigh on earnings forecast
text: Shares of Marvell Technology Inc. fell more than 5% in after-hours trading Thursday after the chip company met expectations with results for its latest quarter but blamed inventory corrections for an outlook that came in below the consensus view.

title: Marvell Technology, Inc. Reports Fourth Quarter and Fiscal Year 2023 Financial Results
text: Q4 Net Revenue: $1.419 billion, grew by 6% year-on-year Q4 Gross Margin: 47.5% GAAP gross margin; 63.5% non-GAAP gross margin Q4 Diluted income (loss) per share: $(0.02) GAAP diluted loss per share; $0.46 non-GAAP diluted income per share SANTA CLARA, Calif. , March 2, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Marvell Technology, Inc. (NASDAQ: MRVL), a leader in data infrastructure semiconductor solutions, today reported financial results for the fourth fiscal quarter and the full fiscal year, ended January 28, 2023.

title: 5 Chip Stocks to Buy for the Upturn, According to an Analyst
text: Raymond James says Nvidia is the “undisputed leader” in artificial intelligence applications.

title: Marvell Launches Industry's First 1.6 Tbps PAM4 Electro-Optics Platform for Cloud AI/ML and Data Center Networks
text: Breakthrough 200 Gbps per lambda DSP doubles the bandwidth of optical modules Enables cloud-optimized 51.2 Tbps networking architectures in 1RU chassis Extends multi-source pluggable optics ecosyst em for 1.6 Tbps mainstream adoption SANTA CLARA, Calif. , March 2, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Marvell Technology, Inc. (NASDAQ: MRVL), a leader in data infrastructure semiconductor solutions, today announced its Marvell® Nova™ 1.6 Tbps PAM4 electro-optics platform, the industry's first of its kind, is sampling to customers.

title: Marvell Announces Cloud-Optimized 51.2 Tbps Networking Platform for AI/ML and Data Center Networks
text: Delivers four times the bandwidth of widely deployed 12.8 Tbps networking solutions Relieves network bottlenecks while reducing power and cost per bit Enables faster time to market with common IP and interoperability SANTA CLARA, Calif. , March 2, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Marvell Technology, Inc. (NASDAQ: MRVL), a leader in data infrastructure semiconductor solutions, today announced a cloud-optimized 51.2 Tbps networking platform to relieve bottlenecks in artificial intelligence (AI)/machine learning (ML) and cloud data center networks.

title: Earnings Previews: Broadcom, Dell, Hewlett Packard Enterprise, Marvell
text: In early trading on Wednesday, the Dow Jones industrials were up 0.05%, but the S&P 500 and the Nasdaq were each down 0.19%.
